citations.narrative:
The research facility did not submit their USDA fiscal year 2025 (FY25) Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or
before the extended deadline due date of 12/31/25. Per this Section, research facilities that use or intend to use live
animals in research, tests, experiments, or for teaching shall submit an annual report, that covers the numbers of animals
used during the previous Federal fiscal year, to the Deputy Administrator on or before the December due date in this
Subchapter of the AWA. Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total
number of animals used and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals
were followed during the previous Federal fiscal year reporting period. The research facility needs to submit their USDA
Annual Report by December 1st of each calendar year unless otherwise informed by USDA APHIS.
Corrected prior to the inspection.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC Coordinator.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The research facility did not submit their USDA fiscal year 2025 (FY25) Annual Report to the Deputy Administrator on or 
before the extended deadline due date of 12/31/25. Per this Section, research facilities that use or intend to use live 
animals in research, tests, experiments, or for teaching shall submit an annual report, that covers the numbers of animals 
used during the previous Federal fiscal year, to the Deputy Administrator on or before the December due date in this 
Subchapter of the AWA. Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate accounting of the total 
number of animals used and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals 
were followed during the previous Federal fiscal year reporting period. The research facility needs to submit their USDA 
Annual Report by December 1st of each calendar year unless otherwise informed by USDA APHIS.  
Corrected prior to the inspection. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC Coordinator.
